candlestick.description: Get a candlestick open-high-low-close chart for the selected currency

get.description: Get current data for a coin

history.description: Get historical data (name, price, market, stats) at a given date for a coin

market.description: Get prices and market related data for all trading pairs that match the selected currency

marketChart.description: Get historical market data include price, market cap, and 24h volume (granularity auto)

price.description: Get the current price of any cryptocurrencies in any other supported currencies that you need

searchBy.description: Search by coin ID or contract address

coinId.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

baseCurrency.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

baseCurrencies.description: The first currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is BTC. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

platformId.description: The ID of the platform issuing tokens

contractAddresses.description: The contract address of tokens, comma-separated

quoteCurrency.description: The second currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is ETH. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

quoteCurrencies.description: The second currency in the pair. For BTC:ETH this is ETH. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

days.description: Return data for this many days in the past from now

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

ids.description: Filter results by comma-separated list of coin ID

order.description: Sorts results by the selected rule

sparkline.description: Whether to include sparkline 7 days data (eg. true, false).

price_change_percentage.description: Include price change percentage for specified times

exchange_ids.description: Filter results by exchange IDs. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

localization.description: Whether to include all localized languages in response

country_code.description: Country code of event. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

type.description: Type of event. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

upcoming_events_only.description: Whether to list only upcoming events
